ddls:
CREATE TABLE "capture_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each capture session */,
  "session_name" TEXT /* Name of the capture session */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the capture session */,
  "trimming_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trimming process applied to the session */,
  "capture_date" TEXT /* Date of the capture session */,
  "capture_device" TEXT /* Device used for motion capture */,
  "capture_software" TEXT /* Software used for motion capture */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frames" (
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frame */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the capture session the frame belongs to */,
  "time_stamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the frame */,
  "hand_left_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the left hand */,
  "hand_left_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the left hand */,
  "hand_left_z" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the left hand */,
  "wrist_left_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the left wrist */,
  "wrist_left_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the left wrist */,
  "wrist_left_z" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the left wrist */,
  "elbow_left_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the left elbow */,
  "elbow_left_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the left elbow */,
  "elbow_left_z" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the left elbow */,
  "shoulder_left_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the left shoulder */,
  "shoulder_left_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the left shoulder */,
  "shoulder_left_z" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the left shoulder */,
  "spine_shoulder_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the spine shoulder */,
  "spine_shoulder_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the spine shoulder */,
  "spine_shoulder_z" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the spine shoulder */,
  "spine_base_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the spine base */,
  "spine_base_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the spine base */,
  "spine_base_z" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the spine base */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the frame was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the frame was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frame_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., animator, developer, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission belongs to */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission assigned to the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_users" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team-user relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team-user relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_teams" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the capture session */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session-team relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session-team relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id", "team_id")
)
